metadata.name: Set up A/V for a Meeting

description: An event coordinator needs to ensure the audio/visual equipment is set up correctly for a small corporate meeting.

nodes.task_description: Review the event booking order to see the client's A/V requirements (projector, screen, two microphones).

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the required equipment list.

nodes.task_description: Create a work order for the in-house A/V technical team.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates a ticket specifying the room, time, and required equipment.

nodes.task_description: Assign the work order to an available A/V technician.

expected_outcome.value: Agent assigns the task to a specific technician.
